message:
fix(trace): switch to deterministic hasher for stable fingerprints

Replace std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher with
crate::util::DetHasher in all trace, fingerprinting, scoring, and
symbol hashing code.

DefaultHasher's algorithm is not guaranteed to be stable across Rust
versions or platforms — it uses SipHash-1-3 today but could change in
any release. For a deterministic simulation runtime, trace fingerprints
and canonicalized certificates must be identical across runs, platforms,
and compiler versions. DetHasher provides this guarantee.

Affected modules: lab/explorer, trace/{canonicalize,certificate,dpor,
scoring}, types/typed_symbol.

Update golden test expected fingerprint constants to match the new
hasher's output (e.g., SEMANTICS_TRACE_FINGERPRINT changed from
17_536_848_186_479_526_199 to 10_997_618_856_612_454_100).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
